nasb.text: When you have finished cleansing it, you shall present a young bull without blemish and a ram without blemish from the flock.

esv.text: When you have finished purifying it, you shall offer a bull from the herd without blemish and a ram from the flock without blemish.

cnv.text: 你潔淨了祭壇之後，就要獻一頭沒有殘疾的公牛犢和羊群中一隻沒有殘疾的公綿羊。

ccb.text: 祭坛洁净后，你要取来一头毫无残疾的公牛犊和一只毫无残疾的公绵羊，
